1.2.87: Certificate error interstitial: bad SSL certs now show a full 'Your connection is not private' warning page
Webview crash recovery: crashed tabs show 'This page has crashed' with a Reload button instead of going blank
Safe Browsing: local blocklist + IDN homograph heuristics block phishing/malware/scam domains with a warning page
Mixed content blocking: HTTP scripts/stylesheets/iframes on HTTPS pages are now blocked; images/fonts auto-upgraded
Error pages: DNS failures, timeouts, connection refused now show Chrome-style error pages with codes and retry
BrowserWindow sandbox enabled (sandbox: true) for stronger process isolation
Spellcheck enabled on main window and all webview tabs
Preload API: added onCertificateError, onWebviewCrashed, onSafeBrowsingWarning listeners
1.2.86: Extension SDK: adblock, settings, proxy, and security-status APIs now exposed to extensions
Privacy Dashboard v2: real ad blocker stats, runtime protection status, IP check, whitelist view
Security Dashboard v2: protection badges, ad blocker details, disk usage, blocked request count
Fixed browser.getInfo() returning hardcoded version — now returns real app version
Extensions use get-security-status (runtime state) instead of settings file for protection toggles
Privacy dashboard: WebRTC and fingerprint checks now clarify iframe vs browsing tab context
Performance view: suspend memory label clarified as estimated
privacy-dashboard added to trusted extensions list
1.2.85: Code structure overhaul: Sidebar split into 20 focused components for faster load and easier maintenance
State management refactored into 6 Zustand slices (tabs, workspaces, UI, settings, bookmarks, extensions)
Removed 30+ MB of unused assets from the install package
Added ESLint, Prettier, and EditorConfig for consistent code quality
Cleaned up duplicate changelog entries and updated project documentation
1.2.84: Critical fix: AI stream listener leak — every AI query was stacking IPC handlers causing duplicate tokens, memory leaks, and CPU waste
All IPC event listeners now return unsubscribe functions for proper cleanup (preload.js)
AI stream cleanup in AiOverlay, AiTabAssistant, AddressBar, ExtensionHost, and companion sync
Companion AI relay race condition fix — rejects concurrent messages instead of overwriting
Companion password sync encryption strengthened with device-local secret in key derivation
Extension toolbar actions now reactively update when extensions are enabled/disabled
Build script safety: clean-build.js no longer kills all Electron processes (only Flip Browser)
Build script safety: package.json auto-restores if build fails mid-pipeline
Security: SSRF protection on AI fetch_url_content tool
Security: AI bookmark tools use encrypted storage instead of raw filesystem
Security: find-in-page input safely escaped with JSON.stringify
Removed duplicate unhandledRejection handler and dead copyDirSync function
Added electron/integrity.json to .gitignore to prevent stale hashes in repo
1.2.83: Removed broken code-editor extension — hidden from browser until fixed
Preset extensions: calendar, weather, community chat, security dashboard, and privacy dashboard now auto-install on first launch
Extension importing from folder paused — install extensions from the Marketplace only
License persistence fix: license now survives browser updates via plaintext backup recovery
License machine ID made more stable using hardware fingerprint instead of hostname
Legacy machine ID backward compatibility so existing licenses still work after update
1.2.79: x402 payments: set treasury address for 2% platform fee collection on Base chain
x402 fee split: content payment goes to resource server, platform fee sent separately to Flip treasury
Fix: update-available popup now shows clean text instead of raw HTML/markdown from release notes
Release notes parser: strips HTML tags, decodes entities, and normalizes bullet points for clean display
1.2.77: Enhanced ad blocker: EasyList + EasyPrivacy with 143K+ filters, per-site whitelist toggle, shield icon in address bar
Anti-tracking: automatically strips 40+ tracking parameters (utm, fbclid, gclid, etc.) from URLs
AI page overlay: floating draggable card for inline AI actions (explain, define, translate, summarize)
AI Tab Assistant: chat with any page — extracts content and enables multi-turn conversation in sidebar
AI Smart Bookmarks: auto-categorizes bookmarks on save, category filter pills, search, inline category editor
Workspaces: switchable tab sets with templates (Dev, Research, Shopping, Social), color coding, Ctrl+Alt+1-9 shortcuts
Session Manager: auto-saves every 30s + on close for crash recovery, named session snapshots
Tab auto-group by domain: one-click to organize all tabs into color-coded domain groups
Smart Tab Suspend: auto-suspends inactive tabs to save memory, suspend stats in Performance panel
Fix: AI summarize now extracts actual page content instead of returning navigation commands
Fix: ad blocker initialization deferred to app-ready so filter lists download properly
Reduced console noise: silenced verbose permission check logs and webview abort errors
1.2.75: Critical fix: companion calls now connect properly (Firestore document path was invalid)
2FA sync: browser now displays TOTP codes from companion in the Passwords sidebar panel
Password vault bidirectional: companion-added passwords now appear in browser with 'Companion' badge
Notifications: browser now receives and displays companion-sent notifications as native OS alerts
Removed wallet sync (wallet removed from companion app)
Companion app: removed File Bridge and Wallet features
1.2.73: AI relay: fixed timing issue where companion prompts could be lost if AI chat extension not yet loaded
Companion sync: all features now actively syncing (passwords, files, wallet, calls, AI, notifications)
1.2.71: Companion sync: browser passwords now push to Firestore vault for companion access
Companion sync: incoming call handler - accept/reject calls from companion app
Companion sync: full-screen call UI overlay with WebRTC video/audio
Companion sync: password sync runs on startup + every 60s
1.2.70: AI relay: companion messages now appear in browser AI chat panel
AI relay: full browser tool use (open tabs, navigate, etc.) from companion
AI relay: sidebar auto-opens to AI chat when companion sends a message
AI relay: streamed responses captured and sent back to companion in real-time
1.2.69: File Bridge: browser now receives companion uploads and opens them automatically
Wallet: browser listens for companion wallet changes in real-time
Notifications: download started events now forwarded to companion
Browser Connected notification sent to companion on sync start
All companion features now have active browser-side listeners
1.2.68: Forward extension notifications to companion app
Forward page change watcher alerts to companion
1.2.67: AI relay: companion messages processed by browser's local AI model
Wallet sync between companion and browser via Firestore
File Bridge metadata sync for cross-device visibility
Chat user discovery and direct messaging
1.2.66: QR code pairing — browser shows a QR code in Settings → Companion App, phone scans to pair instantly
Security hardening — one-time pairing tokens with SHA-256 verification, 5-minute expiry, auto-cleanup
Device identity — persistent browser device ID for all sync operations
Input sanitization — blocks javascript:/data: URIs, validates all remote commands
Replay protection — remote commands older than 60s are rejected and deleted
Data minimization — commands deleted after processing, tabs synced as single doc instead of per-tab
1.2.64: Flip Companion App support — pair your phone with Flip Browser to sync tabs, send URLs, and receive notifications
Companion App settings card — new pairing UI in Settings with connect/disconnect controls
Tab sync — open browser tabs are pushed to companion app every 15 seconds via Firestore
Remote commands — companion app can open URLs and close tabs in the browser remotely
Download notifications — completed downloads are forwarded to the companion app
1.2.63: Fixed auto-translate — was reading language from wrong store path, now correctly reads settings.language
1.2.62: Auto-translate — pages are now automatically translated when browser language is set to non-English
Silent floating banner at bottom-right with Show Original / Translate toggle, auto-fades after 5s
Detects page language from html lang attribute and meta tags, skips pages already in user's language
1.2.61: Rebuilt page translation — now translates text in-place without redirecting to Google Translate
Translation shows live progress, supports 18 languages, and has a Restore button to undo
Auto-translates on open, batches requests for speed, skips code/pre/input elements
1.2.60: Fixed premium purchase — Stripe Checkout now opens correctly in a new tab after entering email
1.2.59: Premium extensions — email-based auth for purchases (no login required, just enter your email)
Email prompt modal in marketplace with modern UI matching browser styling
Fixed auth flow — no longer depends on Firebase token from extensions
1.2.58: Premium extensions support — marketplace now shows pricing badges and Buy buttons for paid extensions
Stripe payment integration — secure checkout with webhook verification for subscription management
Entitlement system — browser checks purchased extensions on startup with 5-min cache
Cancel subscription support from within the browser
1.2.57: Security Dashboard threat scan fix — double-extension detection no longer flags version-numbered filenames (e.g. node-v22.19.0-x64.msi) as false positives
Only flags true deceptive double extensions like invoice.pdf.exe
1.2.56: New Security Dashboard extension — monitor active network connections, scan for suspicious files, view listening ports, and audit startup items
New Flip.security API — extensions can now access netstat, listening ports, process names, startup items, and threat scanning
Shield icon for Security Dashboard in sidebar and extension manager
1.2.55: File Cleaner icon fix — Trash2 icon now shows in sidebar and extension manager
1.2.54: File Cleaner freeze fix — all filesystem operations converted to async with depth/file caps to prevent browser lockups
Folder sizes now load incrementally in background instead of blocking the UI
1.2.53: New Flip.fs API — extensions can now list, scan, and delete files from safe public folders (Downloads, Desktop, Documents, Temp)
New File Cleaner extension — browse and clean up unwanted files to free disk space
SHA-256 hash verification for extension downloads and auto-updates
XRPL Wallet security — local QR codes, pinned xrpl.js, auto-lock, rate limiting on password attempts
1.2.52: Tab context menu fix — right-click menu no longer hidden behind the top bar
Flip AI x.com automation — use /x commands to tweet, read timeline, read notifications, like, and reply directly from Flip AI
Community Chat — bug report reminder added to extension description
Descriptive tooltips — hover over toolbar buttons for helpful descriptions
Permission label fix — 'Deny by Default' changed to 'Ask when a site requests access' (permissions were never silently denied)
1.2.48: Extension file saving fix — net.saveFile was blocked by wrong permission gate ('network' instead of 'storage'). File Converter, GIF Maker, and Image Editor now correctly save to Downloads folder.
Image Editor rendering fix — images now display correctly on the canvas after loading
1.2.47: Extension file saving — File Converter, GIF Maker, and Image Editor switched from broken link.click() to Flip.net.saveFile()
Image Editor v1.1.0, File Converter v1.1.0, GIF Maker v1.1.0 — updated with proper save functionality
1.2.46: Flip Call voice call fix — users couldn't hear each other on audio-only calls because there was no audio element to play the remote stream
Flip Call v1.2.0 — added hidden audio element for voice calls + auto-update will deliver the fix to all users
1.2.45: Extension auto-update — installed extensions now silently update from the marketplace on browser startup when a newer version is available
Camera & mic deep fix — permission handlers now match by webContents ID (bulletproof, no origin guessing) + getUserMedia polyfill uses parent window as fallback
Flip Call v1.1.0 — improved error handling with auto audio-only fallback when no camera detected
1.2.44: Camera & mic permission fix — extensions like Flip Call now get auto-granted media access (file:// origin was silently denying all requests)
Flip Call audio fallback — automatically switches to voice-only if no camera is detected instead of failing
Better error messages — specific feedback for 'no device found', 'permission denied', and other media errors
1.2.43: Flip Call dark screen fix — reverted blob URL iframe approach that caused extensions to render as a black screen
WebRTC extensions now run without sandbox restrictions for proper camera/mic device access
1.2.42: Camera & microphone permissions fix — added Electron 28 permission check and device handlers so sites can properly request camera/mic access
Permission prompt redesigned — now a prominent floating overlay card centered on screen instead of a tiny bar that blended into the UI
Flip Call & WebRTC fix — extensions with WebRTC now use blob URLs instead of srcDoc iframes, fixing 'Requested device not found' errors for camera/mic
Device permission persistence — granted camera/mic access is now remembered per-site so users aren't asked repeatedly
1.2.41: Marketplace icons overhaul — every extension now has a unique, purpose-matched icon (Calculator, QR Code, Gauge, Camera, Film, Wallet, Shield, and more)
Tab favicon highlight fix — active tab indicator softened from harsh orange ring to subtle tint for cleaner sidebar look
Auto-updates enabled — updates now download silently in the background and install on next quit, no manual action needed
Extension icon consistency — unified icon mappings across Marketplace, Extension Manager, and Extension Panel
1.2.40: Flip Browser completed version — celebration confetti animation on update
Flip Share extension — peer-to-peer file sharing via WebRTC DataChannels, room codes, drag-and-drop, chunked transfers with progress bar and speed indicator, transfer history

Weather Widget redesigned — animated SVG weather scenes (sun, clouds, rain, snow, thunder, fog), gradient hero card, 3-day forecast, stat cards for humidity/wind/visibility/UV/pressure/cloud cover, no emojis
Daily motivational quotes — new tab page shows a curated inspirational quote that changes each day
World News upgraded — switched from NBC to BBC World News RSS feed with deduplication for cleaner headlines
Flip Share download fix — received files now auto-save to Downloads folder via new Flip.net.saveFile IPC pipeline (sandboxed iframe blocked all previous download methods)
Downloads panel integration — Flip Share received files now appear in the sidebar Downloads panel with 'via Flip Share' source label
1.2.35: World News on home page — NBC News RSS feed displayed below search bar with thumbnails, timestamps, and refresh
Wallpaper persistence fix — resolved race condition where default settings overwrote saved wallpaper on startup
Extensions in full tab — Screenshot Annotator, Meme Generator, and Flip Call can now open in a full browser tab via flip://ext/ URLs
Open in Tab button — expand icon added to Screenshot Annotator, Meme Generator, and Flip Call headers to launch in a full tab
Responsive canvas — Screenshot Annotator and Meme Generator canvases now scale dynamically to fill available width in full tab mode
Meme Generator image fix — fixed template images not rendering on canvas due to CORS and useEffect dependency bug
Extension fetch base64 support — ext-fetch-url IPC handler now supports binary/base64 responses for loading images
Security fix — removed hardcoded TURN server credentials from Flip Call extension
Security fix — removed hardcoded Tomorrow.io API key from Weather Widget, switched to free wttr.in API
Security fix — added SSRF protection to ext-fetch-url blocking localhost, loopback, and private/internal IP ranges
Tab suspension improvement — all flip:// internal tabs (extensions, marketplace, devtools) are now excluded from auto-suspension
1.2.34: Privacy Dashboard fix — correctly detects Flip Browser via extension SDK (window.Flip) instead of window.flipAPI
Privacy Dashboard — HTTPS, cookies, and WebRTC checks now account for Flip Browser built-in protections instead of reporting false negatives from the sandboxed iframe
Privacy Dashboard — added 1360x768 and other common resolutions to screen fingerprint check
Privacy Dashboard — new Extension Sandboxing check awards points for Flip's isolated iframe APIs
Privacy Dashboard — improved descriptions with actionable context across all checks
1.2.33: Flip Call extension — peer-to-peer video and voice calling with PeerJS, room codes, call history
Image Editor extension — crop, resize, rotate, flip, brightness/contrast/saturation filters, canvas-based editing
Drawing Canvas extension — freehand drawing with shapes, colors, brush sizes, layers, and PNG export
File Converter extension — convert images between PNG, JPEG, WebP, BMP with quality and resize controls
Meme Generator extension — create memes with classic templates or custom images, top/bottom text, font customization
Screenshot Annotator extension — paste or upload screenshots, annotate with arrows, rectangles, circles, text, highlights, blur, freehand, undo/redo, export PNG
GIF Maker extension — create animated GIFs from image frames with built-in NeuQuant color quantizer and LZW encoder, frame reorder, speed and size controls
Video Downloader extension — download videos from direct URLs (MP4, WebM, etc.), clipboard paste, format detection, download history
Privacy Dashboard extension — privacy score with 13+ checks (HTTPS, Do Not Track, WebRTC leaks, canvas fingerprinting, screen resolution, CPU cores, device memory), tips and fingerprint analysis tabs
Link Safety Checker extension — URL threat analysis with 14+ heuristics (phishing keywords, suspicious TLDs, homograph attacks, IP domains, URL shorteners, executable links), safety score 0-100
Speed Test extension — download and upload speed measurement via Cloudflare, latency and jitter testing, speed grade, persistent history
WebRTC permission support — extensions can now request camera/microphone access with the webrtc permission
Marketplace Security category — new category for Privacy Dashboard and Link Safety Checker
11 new marketplace extensions bringing the total catalog to 30+

Crypto News fix — replaced unreliable allorigins.win CORS proxy with native Flip.net.fetch, feeds now load in parallel
Crypto News tabs permission — Read button now correctly opens articles in a new browser tab
World Clock extension — 42 cities with analog clock faces, day/night indicators, timezone search, and persistent city list
IP Lookup extension — public IP geolocation, ISP info, proxy/hosting/mobile detection, lookup any IP with history
